## [I built a framework for running AI teammates in your Slack, operated entirely from inside Claude Code](https://reddit.com/r/ClaudeAI/comments/1sxy6og/i_built_a_framework_for_running_ai_teammates_in/)
*Reddit r/ClaudeAI* | 28/04/2026 | Score: 0.86
Tags: api_update, developer_tool

> I run a small smart-home company called Ginnie (hence the name). There's always more work than hands. Investigations to run, dashboards to scan, follow-ups to chase. I wanted more hands. Real teammates, not chatbots, not function-calling demos. So I built ginnie-agents and ran my own team on it for months. Open-sourcing it now.
